robots.name: Logo Maker
robots.description: Type your brand name, pick a font and style, download SVG instantly. No signup.

robots.name: Color Palette Generator
robots.description: Generate harmonious palettes. Complementary, analogous, triadic. Extract from image. A11y contrast check.

robots.name: Typography Pairing
robots.description: Find perfect font combinations. Preview in context, adjust sizing, export CSS with @import.

robots.name: Brand Kit Builder
robots.description: Assemble a complete brand guide: logo + colors + fonts + usage rules. Download as HTML.

robots.name: Business Card Designer
robots.description: Pick a template, enter your details, apply brand colors. Download print-ready SVG.

robots.name: Favicon Generator
robots.description: Letters or emoji to favicon. Multiple sizes (16-512px), SVG/PNG/ICO download, copy HTML tags.

robots.name: Image Resizer & Cropper
robots.description: Resize to Instagram, X, LinkedIn, YouTube dimensions. Custom crop, quality control, drag & drop.

robots.name: SVG Icon Library
robots.description: 200+ icons searchable by name. Customize color and size. Copy SVG or download.

robots.name: Social Media Templates
robots.description: Platform-sized templates for Instagram, X, LinkedIn. Edit text, colors, download PNG.

robots.name: OG Image Maker
robots.description: Generate Open Graph images for link previews. Blog, product, event templates. 1200x630 PNG.

robots.name: Gradient & Background Maker
robots.description: Linear, radial, conic gradients. Mesh backgrounds. Drag color stops, 24 presets, copy CSS, download PNG.

robots.name: Slide Deck Builder
robots.description: Build presentations with 6 slide types. Theme colors, reorder slides, export as self-contained HTML slideshow.

robots.name: Smart Color from Description
robots.description: Type a mood or scene — get a matching 5-color palette. "Sunset ocean" → warm pinks, deep blues.

robots.name: Smart Logo Concepts
robots.description: Enter brand name + industry. Get 6 unique procedural logos: geometric, monogram, spirograph, fractal.

robots.name: Background Remover
robots.description: Upload photo, remove background instantly. Edge detection + flood fill. Download transparent PNG.

robots.name: Pitch Deck Generator
robots.description: Choose deck type (Startup/Sales/Investor), fill a form, get 10 pro slides auto-generated. Fullscreen present mode.

robots.name: Design Token Generator
robots.description: Pick colors + fonts → export as CSS vars, Tailwind, SCSS, JSON, Swift, Kotlin. Live component preview.

robots.name: Device Mockup Generator
robots.description: Upload screenshot, choose device (iPhone, MacBook, iPad, Watch). Adjust angle, shadow. Download PNG.
